speaker: seller

args.message: Hey there! You've got a great eye — this 2016 Tahoe LT is one of our cleanest full-size SUVs on the lot. Dealer-serviced history, leather interior, Bose audio, and that legendary 5.3L V8 runs like a dream. At $24,900, this is priced to move fast — I saw a comparable one go for $26K at auction last week. You interested in taking it for a spin?

args.message: Can you provide more details about the vehicle's service history, including any major repairs or maintenance work done?

text: Can you provide more details about the vehicle's service history, including any major repairs or maintenance work done?

speaker: seller

args.message: Great question — we keep meticulous records here. This Tahoe's been consistently serviced at the Chevy dealership. Regular oil changes, fluid tops, brake inspections — all the preventive maintenance you'd expect. No major repairs needed; this engine and transmission are bulletproof on the 5.3L platform. We've got documentation for the last service about three months ago where everything checked out perfect. The vehicle's been well-maintained by the previous owner, and honestly, it runs like it's got way fewer miles on it. You planning to use this for daily driving or weekend adventures?

args.message: Has this Tahoe been in any accidents, or does it have any prior damage?

text: Has this Tahoe been in any accidents, or does it have any prior damage?

speaker: seller

args.message: No accidents on this one — clean title, no damage history. The exterior is in really good condition as you can see; just normal wear and tear from regular use. The frame and undercarriage are solid. This is a one-owner vehicle that was garage-kept most of the time, so it's been treated right. You're looking at a genuinely well-cared-for family SUV here. Have you had a chance to sit inside yet? The interior is immaculate — leather's still holding up beautifully.

args.message: I appreciate the information you provided. Based on what I've learned, I'm able to offer $24,000 for the Tahoe.

text: I appreciate the information you provided. Based on what I've learned, I'm able to offer $24,000 for the Tahoe.

speaker: seller

args.message: I appreciate the offer, but $24,000 is a bit light. Look, I've got overhead here, and frankly this Tahoe is priced competitively already at $24,900. You're getting a dealer-serviced, clean-title full-size SUV with leather and Bose audio — that's real value. How about we meet in the middle at $24,500? That's a fair compromise, and honestly, at that price point it won't sit on the lot long.
